title: caltha novae-zelandiae var. introloba
intro: Caltha novae-zelandiae var. introloba is a variant of the New Zealand marsh marigold, a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Caltha novae-zelandiae var. introloba include soothing irritated skin, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
